headline: SEE SUPPLIER RISK BEFORE IT BECOMES A RECALL
subheading: Design lean, risk-weighted vendor KPIs that turn supplier oversight into inspection-ready, defensible evidence.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical supplier performance monitoring and early-warning quality oversight, set against a deep navy background. A constellation of softly glowing teal and cyan data nodes connected by thin luminous lines forms an interconnected supplier network, with elegant semi-translucent performance scorecards and floating gauge dials hovering at varied depths. Ascending and dipping trend ribbons in cyan and a subtle emerald-green accent suggest right-first-time rates and risk signals, some nodes pulsing brighter to imply emerging warnings. Layered translucent glass panels, fine grid textures and concentric ring indicators convey precision, structure and continuous measurement. Shallow depth of field with delicate bokeh, cool premium clinical-luxury atmosphere, calm and authoritative, refined minimal data-visualisation aesthetic, soft volumetric glow. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
